_meta.source: Figma — Design Master File › Echo email (node 5535:5144)
_meta.note: Single generic email for all echo types. Hand-edited only to add the documented token gaps below. Re-pull from Figma if variables change. Keep this file as the single source of truth for the MJML build and the Python sender.

bg._gap: navyDeep/navy/card are NOT yet Figma variables — the design uses an image+gradient background. Approximated from the screenshot. Replace with real Bg/* tokens when design adds them (see README 'Token gaps').

font._titleNote: Title (`Your Echo`) is Heading L: 3XL/32px, line-height XXL/40px (Figma 5535:5144). Subtitle is Body XS/14, link/quote are M/18 and L/20.

radius._outlook: Outlook ignores radius — square fallback is expected.

links._note: All resolved at send-time by the Python sender from env + per-echo data. Listed here so the MJML placeholders and the sender agree on names.

assets._note: Absolute https CDN URLs, injected at render. No base64/embedded images (size + client support). The link-only email needs just these three (+ optional starfield bg); the old per-type media assets (play/download/waveform/video-badge/hero) are no longer referenced.
